title: CashPLN
description: A mod that adds Currency to Minecraft
body:
![CASH PLN](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c5d88a8bab4c8849e27543f01ce3978ab21f084.png)
# 📖 What does this mod add?
**This Minecraft mod adds currency and credit cards to Minecraft!**


![INFO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6756cc9bbb9d5c60f08ceff17e0a8e25fd8ff25c.png)
# 🏳️Features
**Added: PLN USD EUR**  
**The mods add Currency and credit cards to Minecraft!**


![ITEMS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71acd37e803578ba175a6c75a75402371c635e85.png)

- PLN:
- 1 Grosz
- 1 Złoty
- 2 Złote
- 5 Złoty
- 10 Złoty
- 20 Złoty
- 50 Złoty
- 100 Złoty
- 200 Złoty
- USD:
- 1 Dollar
- 5 Dollars
- 10 Dollars
- 20 Dollars
- 50 Dollars
- 100 Dollars
- EUR:
- 5 Euro
- 10 Euro
- 20 Euro
- 50 Euro
- 100 Euro
- 200 Euro
- VISA Santander Card
- VISA Buisness Card
- MBank Mastercard Card

## IMAGES 📷

![ITEMS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5235227290083e8aff2dd5dba7b93284a1810cb3.png)
![ITEMS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7de6ebc920f88ea264e36436bd211c8e62d8623c.png)
![ITEMS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1381ee345746075a656bb4b23cb8052f0945983.png)

**MOD SUPPORTS ONLY MINECRAFT 1.20.1 FORGE!**
